Plaintiff Mark Dvorak'S Motion To Compel Production Of Documents From Defendant Pauline Howland And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Mar-01-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Piper Morrison of Zacks & Freedman telephone number 415-956-8100 for Plaintiff.
No other appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

Plaintiff's Counsel stipulated to the Judge Pro Tem. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Plaintiff Mark Dvorak's Motion To Compel Production Of Documents From Defendant Pauline Howland And For Sanctions is granted. While defendant provided a document response after the filing of the motion said response is replete with objections that were waived by the failure of the defendant to provide a timely response. Defendant shall provide a further verified response within twenty days of the date of signing of the order to be entered herein. To the extent documents were not produced based on as assertion of the attorney-client or attorney work product privilege, a privilege log shall be served. Monetary sanctions in the sum of $1,200.00 are awarded as against defendant's counsel only, to be paid at the same time as service of said responses. Order signed in open Court.

Judge Pro Tem: Steven Stein. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported. (302/JPT)
